sourcePrompt: An AH-1G Cobra attack helicopter, about thirteen meters long but barely a meter wide across the fuselage - a flying blade parked on skinny skids. A tandem cockpit steps up from the gunner in front to the pilot behind under a long glass canopy, a rounded chin turret with a minigun hangs under the nose, and short stub wings. Low-poly, +X forward, ground at Y=0; named pivots for moving parts.
